历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science was approximately 5527 → 7356 → 21488 → 11069 → 9721. A significant gap occurred in 2023 (21488th), rebounded sharply to 11069th in 2024, and continued to move forward to 9721st in 2025, showing a sustained recovery trend in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 9721st. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 32 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 28 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 27, a reduction of about 3.6% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 82nd (2026), stable in the 82–92 range in recent years. Reputation was slightly positive in 2025 (Journalism and Communication rated A++). In 2026, reputation is slightly negative (dormitory fire incident), but Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 11th (high heat), with overall high attention. No significant admission gaps recorded. Journalism and Communication A+ (top nationally), directly corresponding to the university's journalism, communication, advertising, and new media majors, strongly attracting the liberal arts group. The science group also offers cross-disciplinary majors like Communication and Advertising.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were highly recommended in 2024, Computer majors recommended (67.8), Electrical Engineering highly recommended (74.28), closely aligning with the university's science group majors such as Digital Media Technology, Electronic Information Engineering, and Data Science, potentially increasing application heat. The province's 2026 Physics Category examinees are approximately 114,000 (estimated), a decrease of about 3% from 2025, slightly easing competition. The university is located in Beijing, not a provincial university. In 2025, the university enrolled 13 students in Heilongjiang Province, accounting for about 2.17% of total enrollment, a stable proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recovery trend in 2025 rankings, the slight reduction in 2026 Physics Category enrollment (3.6%), the slight decrease in provincial Physics Category examinees (about 3%), and the sustained high heat of popular majors like Electronic Information/Communication, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to continue moving forward from 9721st (easier to enter). Predicted minimum ranking approximately 9483rd, range 8983–9983rd.
